name: frontend-slides-jp
description: Japanese-enhanced fork of frontend-slides. Japanese typography, 6 JP-optimized presets, and single-source HTML + text-selectable PDF + editable PPTX pipeline.

plugins.name: frontend-slides-jp
plugins.description: Japanese-enhanced HTML presentation generator with 18 curated visual themes (12 original + 6 Japanese-optimized), full CJK typography support, single-source HTML/PDF/PPTX pipeline, and format selection at session start. Fork of zarazhangrui/frontend-slides.
